case_title: LASALLE APARTMENTS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. ESTATE OF RODNEY STOKES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LASALLE APARTMENTS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTATE OF RODNEY STOKES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 65 OSCEOLA LANE #1, S.F. CA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
